deckTitle: AI Presentation Design Engine Demo v10
subtitle: Headless JS slide builder with design tokens, brand support, image roles, quality reports, and visual self-review prompts

slides.title: AI Presentation Design Engine
slides.subtitle: A reusable deck builder that combines content JSON, designer-theme JSON, design planning, and headless PowerPoint rendering.

slides.title: What this version adds
bullets: Deck-wide design pass for visual rhythm and references
More layout variants and training-specific slide types
Preview rendering and contact-sheet review workflow

slides.title: The system has four layers
bullets: Content JSON: slide titles, bullets, tables, metrics
Theme JSON: colors, fonts, spacing, design tokens
Planner: adds variants and design metadata
Renderer: generates PowerPoint from planned deck
